name: GitCraft
description: Automatically bump SemVer versions from Git commits using Conventional Commits.
author: GitCraft OSS

inputs.name: releaseChannel
inputs.label: Release Channel
inputs.helpMarkDown: Determines the pre-release suffix. Auto-detected from the current branch when left empty.

inputs.name: tagPrefix
inputs.label: Tag Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix applied to git tags (e.g. 'v' produces v1.2.3).

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: Path Filter
inputs.helpMarkDown: Only analyze commits touching this path. Used for independent versioning in monorepos. Example: packages/api

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.label: Dry Run
inputs.helpMarkDown: Preview the release without creating tags, pushing, or writing the changelog. Safe to use in PR builds.

outputVariables.name: Version
outputVariables.description: The resolved next semantic version (e.g. 1.4.0 or 1.4.0-alpha.2).

outputVariables.name: Tag
outputVariables.description: The full git tag applied (e.g. v1.4.0).

outputVariables.name: BumpType
outputVariables.description: The version bump type applied: major, minor, or patch.

outputVariables.name: ReleaseNotes
outputVariables.description: Generated CHANGELOG.md entry for this release in Markdown format.
